channel.title: Architecture on BodyMetrics Docs
channel.description: Official documentation for BodyMetrics — a Garmin Connect IQ widget for body metrics tracking on your Forerunner 265.

item.title: Architecture
item.description: Module boundaries, dependency rules, and layered structure of the BodyMetrics codebase.

item.title: Data Flow
item.description: How data moves from persistent storage to the screen in BodyMetrics.
